auction.name: 07WD - 300AA0062 Nickel Powder
auction.commercials_terms: Each company agree to deliver the raw material referring to the specification enclosed. If a deviation is needed, R&D needs to agree participating to the eAuction. Contract and deliveries will stand from July 15th to December 15th 2024 MOQ mini 2000kg  12 000 kg call contract - 2 000kg per months + 2 000 security stock, total volume 14 000kg If the security stock is not called, it will be automatically delivered with the last order of December. Prices must be € currency Prices must be DDP Porte du Ried 68320 - 22 rue des americains Payment terms are determined for each supplier in Welding Alloys system and each participant agreed to apply the same condition as usual
